# ACME Org — Company Overview

ACME Org is a B2B SaaS company founded in 2019, headquartered in Portland, Oregon with remote offices in London and Singapore. The company builds logistics and supply chain optimization software for mid-market retailers (500–5,000 employees). As of Q1 2026, ACME has 340 employees, 1,200 customers, and $48M ARR.

**Mission:** Make supply chain intelligence accessible to every retailer, not just the Fortune 500.

**Core values:** Ship with confidence. Default to transparency. Customers are partners.

---
